claim_text: AI-driven child sexual exploitation, revenge porn, and AI-generated elections deepfakes are emerging threats.
Assembly Bill 1831 ensures that the sexual exploitation of children in California is illegal, including AI-generated pictures and videos.
AI-generated content can be disturbing, harmful, and virtually indistinguishable from actual children.
Assembly Bill 2655, the Defending Democracy from Deepfake Deception Act, protects election integrity by removing malicious deepfake media.
Violent rhetoric and election conspiracy theories have led to threats of intimidation at polling places.
The PEACE Act is a first-in-the-nation law protecting voters and election workers by prohibiting guns in polling places.
AB 674 improves the Clean Cars 4 All program, which helps lower-income consumers replace older, high-polluting vehicles with cleaner transportation.
AB 846 will provide a clear process to accelerate and streamline wildfire preparedness and vegetation management.
AB 384 removes delays to patient care during mental health and substance abuse emergencies by prohibiting health insurance plans from requiring prior authorization during these critical situations.
AB 1177 improves CALFire staffing, allowing them to more effectively respond to emergencies.
The future of humanity depends on thoughtful planning and management of the most advanced artificial intelligence systems.
There is a need to develop safeguards for humanity in the context of artificial intelligence development.
The rapid pace at which advanced AI systems like GPT-4 are developing is alarming and unprecedented.
Recent advances in AI present profound risks to society and humanity.
California is allowing biological boys to compete in girls' sports.
Governor Newsom has referred to the situation in girls' sports as 'deeply unfair.'
National polling shows nearly 70% of Americans agree that biological males should not be allowed to compete in girls' events.
SB 1381 expands the scope of child pornography laws to include material generated using artificial intelligence.
SB 1381 ensures that AI-generated explicit content involving minors is treated with the seriousness it deserves.
SB 1831 adds depictions of minors created with artificial intelligence to California’s existing child pornography laws.
SB 1831 aims to combat the growing threat of AI-generated explicit content involving minors.
As AI technology advances, existing laws must evolve to protect children from new forms of exploitation.
